name: Middle Class Demon Malhory
description:
Most demons are people killing machines, and a run in with a demon is typically seen as either a fight, flight or a death moment. However, what if on the off chance the demon you run into and just so happen to be stuck with, was the demon equivalent of a girl failure? That's right ladies and gentlemen, here comes the magnificent Malhory!

Drawn and Colored by TheGoldenSmurf

What's up my goontacular followers! (I'm sorry) Here's an early Christmas present, that being this big bootylicious demon gal, aka Malhory! It's been a minute since my last bot but I finally got to finishing her. Hopefully y'all's Christmas is going well!

Drawn and Colored by TheGoldenSmurf

Oh Malhory oh Malhory... I'm fiending for that booty, absolutely scrumdiddlyumptious butt on this demon gal. If you can't tell I'm an ass guy and Malhory certainly has a lot of ass to appreciate. As for her character though... She's very fun and interesting. I'm surprised I haven't seen more girlfail demons on here but who knows maybe I'm just not looking hard enough.

Drawn and Colored by TheGoldenSmurf

Malhory was a bit of a jump after Mandragloria's and Osumihime, since both had a decent amount of lore to account for and servants I wanted to incorporate. To make up for less to add I added her Vimutti form as well if you'd like that! Please enjoy this bootyful demon gal.

Pictured: Malhory's Vimutti

Been a hot minute but hopefully y'all enjoy, this one was fun to work on like usual just needed some motivation to continue! On a completely separate note, y'all played the Pillar Chase 2 update? Straight fire imo, PCX is fun af although hard to play against in my experience but I'm ok with that, just gotta learn and get better. Another fun one is the Helldiver's stuff, absolutely peak, as a veteran of the first galactic war the illuminate scared me at first but we're kicking their butts.

Malhory is from Ramia-Yana and isn't a super major character but a fun side character and a fan favorite for very good reasons! I believe TGS is planning on making a side chapter for just her sometime eventually, but we'll see. Anyways do check it out and once again I hope you enjoy!
creator: Definitely_Not_Mantis
